task_completion.description: Verify that the patient waiting area has seating for at least 20 people.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D plan, 3D view, or the furniture list pane in Sweet Home 3D. Count the chairs or seating units in the main waiting area to ensure there are at least 20.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a reception counter and a nurse workstation desk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 2 desks or counter structures placed in the layout (one serving as a reception counter in the waiting area, and another as a nurse workstation).

task_completion.description: Verify there are at least two examination rooms, each equipped with an exam table and chairs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 2 separate rooms configured as exam rooms. Each must contain a bed/exam table and at least two chairs (representing the physician and patient chairs).

task_completion.description: Verify there is a restroom accessible from the waiting area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a room containing at least 1 toilet. The room should have a door or opening that connects directly or via a hallway to the waiting area.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed layout is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Sweet Home 3D window title bar for 'clinic_layout.sh3d' or a file explorer window/terminal showing 'clinic_layout.sh3d' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to create the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application interface open and being actively used, rather than just a terminal or text editor modifying the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the furniture catalog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The furniture catalog pane should be visible, and items should appear progressively in the 2D plan and 3D view, indicating manual placement.

integrity.description: Verify the agent saved the file through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the updated filename 'clinic_layout.sh3d' in the Sweet Home 3D title bar should be visible in the later screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scoring logic expects the final layout to contain at least 20 chairs, 2 desks, 2 beds (exam tables), and 1 toilet. The total points sum to 100, with a passing threshold of 70. The starter file is 'medical_clinic_starter.sh3d', and the final file must be saved as 'clinic_layout.sh3d' in /home/ga/Documents/.
